overview: A functional medicine clinic treating chronic conditions through root-cause analysis. Care is delivered by doctors, health coaches, and nutritionists with frequent patient contact and educational support.
highlights: Multidisciplinary team of doctors, health coaches, and nutritionists
Specialized therapies including IM injections, laser, PEMF, and ozone
Medical weight loss and metabolic health programs
targetAudience: People managing chronic health conditions who seek a functional medicine approach to health optimization.
